The key responsibilities include leading and managing a block-level team, planning and executing project activities, liaising with various external agencies, nurturing local organizations, and overseeing the financial and administrative functions of the block unit, all while conducting extensive field visits.

PG Degree OR PG Diploma in a wide range of fields including Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Dairy Technology, Fishery, Horticulture, Hotel Management, Rural Management, Retails Management, Food Technology, Fashion, Sericulture, or Management, or a BBA or a Graduate Degree OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India. Key responsibilities include implementing livelihood initiatives in areas like agriculture and beekeeping, training and nurturing community-level cadres, and developing Village Livelihood Plans to identify and capitalize on potential opportunities.

Bachelor’s Degree in Any Stream OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India. Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/institution in India. Key responsibilities include maintaining and updating financial records at the DPCU/BPIU level, providing secretarial support to block-level staff, organizing and preserving official documentation, and managing both upward and downward official communications.

Key responsibilities involve working at the village level within a cluster to form and nurture Self-Help Groups (SHGs), provide basic training, manage community support cadres, facilitate micro-plans and bank linkages, supervise CIF utilization, and resolve conflicts.
Block IT Executive: B.Tech in Computer Science/IT, BCA, B.Sc. in IT, or PGDCA, OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India with computer typing in both Hindi and English. For more complete information, kindly read the Bihar JEEViKA Recruitment Exam Notification 2025. Key responsibilities include streamlining the digitization process, delivering IT training to block-level teams, extracting data for reporting purposes, maintaining IT equipment, and ensuring accurate data digitization through regular field visits.

title: PM Kisan 21st Instalment Payment Status 2025 {Direct Link} Beneficiary List
shortInfo: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana was launched by Prime Minister Narendra Modi ji on 24th February 2019. And under this scheme, the government gives assistance of ₹6,000 to small farmers in three Instalment Payment Status every year. Every year, the first Instalment Payment Status comes between 1st December and 31st March, the second Instalment Payment Status from 1st April to 31st July, and the third Instalment Payment Status from 1st August to 30 November will be transferred directly to the bank account of the farmers.
applicationFeeBullets: PM Modi Ji is helping a lot of farmers through the PM Kisan Scheme 2025.
You will get ₹6000 rupees which will be transferred to your bank account.
You will receive money only when you are registered online.
The profits of this scheme are available in every state of India, except West Bengal.
Currently, new laws have been enacted for this scheme, and PM Modi Ji says that there will be no harm to our farmers and their families by this.
Farmers can also buy seeds and food items for their cultivation from the benefits provided PM Kisan Scheme.
howToApply: First of all, candidates need to visit the official website PM Kisan Samman Nidhi – pmkisan.gov.in

Then you have to select one option from the given Aadhar Number, Mobile Number, or Account Number.
Enter your details and then verify.
Finally, you have to click on the Get Data Button.
PM Kisan Beneficiary List 2025 will appear on your device screen.

vacancyDetails.up scholarship eligibility 2025: 8th Exam Passed and Enrolled with Class 09th & for Class 10th, Candidates 9th Exam Passed and Enrolled with Class 10th.

selectionProcess: First of All One Time Registration (OTR) is Mandatory from Session 2025-26 for Applying for UP Scholarship 2025 (scholarship.up.gov.in)
There are Three Step Process : Mobile Number Authentication, Aadhaar e-KYC and OTR Number Generation.
After Successfully Generation of OTR, OTR Number will be Show as well as it will be sent to Registered Mobile Number.

While Applying, the Candidate will have to Fill all the Columns Carefully so that No Mistake can be made like – Name of the Candidate, Father’s Name, Mother’s Name, Date of Birth, Address, Qualification Details.
Now You Need to Complete the Registration Process in Scholarship Portal with Name, Father Name, College & Mobile Number. The Registration Number is Generated After Successfully Registration.
Filling form & Submission and Upload the Required Documents.
Biometric Authentication, Verification and Forwarding from Institute.
Forms are Verified by District Scholarship Committee (Students Can Check forms are Accepted OR Rejected)

Aadhar Based Fund Disbursement (Final Step) All students whose status has been verified and recommended by the District Scholarship Committee will receive their funds through the Aadhaar-based system. The scholarship amount will be directly credited to their bank accounts.

Code 01 – Bachelor’s Degree and passed or appearing in the final year of 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (by whatever name known). OR
Code 02 – Graduation with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in 1-year Bachelor in Education (B.Ed). OR
Code 03 – Graduation with at least 45% marks and passed or appearing in 1-year Bachelor in Education (B.Ed), in accordance with the NCTE Norms OR
Code 04 – Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in the final year of 4- year Bachelor’s in Elementary Education (B.El.Ed). OR
Code 05 – Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in the final year of 4-year B.A/B.Sc.Ed or B.A.Ed/B.Sc.Ed. OR
Code 06 – Bachelor’s Degree with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in 1-year B.Ed. / (B.Ed Special Education)
Code 07 – Any candidate having a qualified B.Ed. A programme recognised by the NCTE is eligible to appear in TET/CTET.
For more complete information, kindly read the CTET Exam Notification 2026.

educationalQualification:
Post Name	Total	Bihar JEEViKA Eligibility 2025
Block Project Manger	73	Bachelor’s Degree in Any Stream OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India.
The key responsibilities include leading and managing a block-level team, planning and executing project activities, liaising with various external agencies, nurturing local organizations, and overseeing the financial and administrative functions of the block unit, all while conducting extensive field visits.
Livelihood Specialist	235	PG Degree OR PG Diploma in a wide range of fields including Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, Dairy Technology, Fishery, Horticulture, Hotel Management, Rural Management, Retails Management, Food Technology, Fashion, Sericulture, or Management, or a BBA or a Graduate Degree OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India.
Key responsibilities include implementing livelihood initiatives in areas like agriculture and beekeeping, training and nurturing community-level cadres, and developing Village Livelihood Plans to identify and capitalize on potential opportunities.
Area Coordinator	374	Bachelor’s Degree in Any Stream OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India.
Key responsibilities include carrying out specialized functions at the block level, coordinating field activities across clusters, and acting as the primary point of contact for initiatives such as micro-planning, bank linkages, institution building, livelihood promotion, and social development.
Accountant (DPCU/BPIU Level)	167	Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/institution in India.
Key responsibilities include maintaining and updating financial records at the DPCU/BPIU level, providing secretarial support to block-level staff, organizing and preserving official documentation, and managing both upward and downward official communications.
Office Assistant (DPCU/BPIU Level)	187	Bachelor’s Degree in Any Stream OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/institution in India With computer typing in both Hindi and English.
Key responsibilities include offering secretarial support to the BPM and other BPIU officials, managing communications and office records, and serving as the primary liaison for communication between the BPIU, DPCU, and SPMU.
Community Coordinator	1177	Fresh Graduate (Male) and Intermediate (Female) in Any Stream OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India With computer typing in both Hindi and English.
Key responsibilities involve working at the village level within a cluster to form and nurture Self-Help Groups (SHGs), provide basic training, manage community support cadres, facilitate micro-plans and bank linkages, supervise CIF utilization, and resolve conflicts.
Block IT Executive	534	B.Tech in Computer Science/IT, BCA, B.Sc. in IT, or PGDCA, OR Equivalent Eligibility From Any Recognized University/ Board/ Institutions in India with computer typing in both Hindi and English.
For more complete information, kindly read the Bihar JEEViKA Recruitment Exam Notification 2025.
Key responsibilities include streamlining the digitization process, delivering IT training to block-level teams, extracting data for reporting purposes, maintaining IT equipment, and ensuring accurate data digitization through regular field visits.
